title: hieracium murorum subsp. sublissodermum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. sublissodermum, also known as wall hawk's beard, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its ability to inhibit inflammation and modulate the immune system. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Hieracium murorum subsp. sublissodermum is often used as a tincture or infused in teas to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
